title: Radical Red Raid Dens
description: A Radical Red Inspired Cobblemon Raid Dens Expansion
body:
# Radical Red Raids: A Radical Red Inspired Cobblemon Raid Dens Expansion

## Description

This datapack significantly expands the Cobblemon Raid Dens raiding experience by introducing hundreds of rare encounters featuring custom-curated move sets and powerful new ability combinations. These changes are inspired by the popular ROM hack Radical Red.

*No affiliation with Radical Red or Radical Trainer mods. But they're awesome, check em out!*

## Main Features

-  **300+ Unique Raid Encounters**: Battle a massive variety of Pokémon specifically optimized for a more challenging and rewarding raid experience.
-  **Custom Abilities & Moves**: Face off against (and catch!) Pokémon with otherwise unobtainable or rare ability-move combos, such as Mega Launcher Magmortar, Technician Donphan, or Simple Magcargo.
-  **30+ Regional Variants**: Adds "Radical" regional pokemon with new stats/types. Example: Water/Dragon Lapras or Electric/Fighting Electivire.
-  **Powerful Movesets**: Every Pokémon has been assigned a hopefully challenging move pool inspired by competitive Smogon sets (taking into account new moves/abilities/AI/etc.), ensuring every radical raid feels like a tough boss battle.


### Links
Wiki: https://github.com/canadians-360/radical-red-raids/wiki

*(Contains tables for all raids, highlights new moves, abilities, etc)*

## Technical Details

This datapack is built specifically to work with the Cobblemon Raid Dens mod and is required for this datapack to function.

## Installation

- Ensure you have Cobblemon and Cobblemon Raid Dens installed.
- Install via Mod Loader or for Servers: Drop this datapack into your world's datapacks folder.
- **Copy the datapack into your resourcepack folder and enable it.**
- Every supported Pokemon has a chance for their raid to be *"radical"*. Look for the Radical den (a calcite and skystone den) type to know you've found one of these rare encounters!
